summary: Comprehensive testing completed for weROI admin dashboard CRUD features. All backend APIs (100%) and frontend features working correctly. Admin password updated to TylerandZach2025!, Edit/Delete/Clear All functionality working, Analytics tabs showing conversion funnels and source tracking, Mobile responsive at 375px.
critical_code_review_comments: All requested features implemented and working correctly
Admin password successfully changed to TylerandZach2025!
Edit modal shows Name, Email, Phone, Company, Status fields with Save Changes button
Delete modal shows confirmation with lead name/email
Clear All buttons (Clear Audit, Clear Guide, Clear All) working with confirmation modal
Analytics tab shows Conversion Funnels (Audit Form Funnel, Popup Capture Funnel) with form views, submissions, conversion rate
Sources tab shows Top Referrers with traffic source data
Frontend analytics tracking working - audit_form_start, page_view, popup_shown events tracked
Mobile responsive admin dashboard working at 375px width
seed_data_creation: Test leads created via pytest with TEST_ prefix for easy identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Admin password is TylerandZach2025!. Backend APIs: PUT /api/leads/audit/{lead_id}, PUT /api/leads/guide/{lead_id}, DELETE /api/leads/audit/{lead_id}, DELETE /api/leads/guide/{lead_id}, DELETE /api/leads/clear-all, POST /api/analytics/event, GET /api/analytics/stats. Frontend: Admin dashboard at /admin-dashboard with Leads tab (Edit/Delete buttons, Clear Audit/Guide/All buttons), Analytics tab (Conversion Funnels), Sources tab (Top Referrers). Mobile responsive at 375px.

backend_api: GET /api/admin/dashboard-data - Returns dashboard data with valid password
PUT /api/leads/audit/{lead_id} - Edit audit lead (name, status, etc.)
GET /api/analytics/stats - Returns unique visitors, page views, audit funnel, popup funnel, top sources
GET /api/leads/export/csv - Returns valid CSV with correct headers
frontend_features: Admin dashboard authenticates with password TylerandZach2025!
Admin dashboard shows 4 stat cards: Unique Visitors, Audit Leads, Guide Downloads, Total Leads
Leads tab shows table with Date, Type, Name, Email, Company, Source, Actions columns
Edit button (pencil icon) opens Edit modal with form fields
Delete button (trash icon) opens Delete confirmation modal
Clear Audit, Clear Guide, Clear All buttons visible and functional
Analytics tab shows Conversion Funnels (Audit Form Funnel, Popup Capture Funnel)
Analytics tab shows Overall Performance (Unique Visitors, Page Views, Overall Conv. Rate)
Sources tab shows Top Referrers with traffic source data
Mobile responsive at 375px - stats cards stacked, tabs visible, buttons accessible
Audit form tracks audit_form_start event on page load
Home page tracks page_view event on mount
